page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. No local storage is bundled with this instance, and it does not include any GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 40 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the ecs.c7nex.8xlarge demonstrates solid compute capabilities. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance is recorded at 1854.09, while the multi-core performance reaches 31066.87. The instance shows strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performance at 161.88 GB/sec, placing it in the top tier of its class. Memory bandwidth tests show read-only small block cached speeds of 1675.96 GB/sec and uncached large block read speeds of 154.46 GB/sec. PassMark CPU and memory scores are 36747.88 and 2705.06 respectively, reflecting consistent mid-range performance across standard operations.

Given its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance offers a balanced compute-to-memory profile suitable for compute-intensive workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The lack of local storage requires reliance on network-attached storage, which is supported by the 40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. This server is well-suited for workloads such as multi-threaded data decompression, static web serving, Redis database operations, and general-purpose compute tasks that benefit from dedicated Intel Xeon cores without GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.8xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a 2.0 GB per core ratio, and operates on the KVM hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on a 40 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for external data transfers. Benchmark results indicate balanced performance, highlighted by a strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression rate of 161.88 GB/sec and a PassMark CPU score of 36747.88. With its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is designed for compute-heavy workloads, including multi-threaded data processing, static web serving, and Redis operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7nex.8xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and 40 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for multi-threaded data processing and web serving.
